headline: Adobe’s AI Agent And PDF Spaces Reframe Document Workflows And Investor Focus
summary: Adobe launched a next generation productivity agent integrated into Acrobat, aimed at reshaping how users work with PDFs using AI. The company also introduced PDF Spaces, a new way to organize, share, and interact with documents in customizable hubs. These updates expand Adobe's AI powered document tools for professionals, enterprises, and everyday users of NasdaqGS:ADBE. Adobe, trading on NasdaqGS:ADBE, is rolling out these features while its stock sits at $247.6, with the share price down...
